title: 1. **AI-Powered Freelance Writing**
summary:
What it is: Offer high-quality, AI-generated content writing services to clients on freelance platforms like Upwork or Fiverr. Utilize Claude AI and local Ollama LLMs to produce engaging articles, blog posts, and website content.
Revenue model: Hourly or project-based pricing for content creation services.
Time to first dollar: 3-5 days.
First action: Create a professional profile on Upwork highlighting Clawmpson's AI-powered content writing capabilities.
Risk/blocker: Initial competition from e
